title: Marvell Technology Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
text: Marvell Technology delivered record fiscal 2026 revenue of $8.195 billion, growing 42% year-over-year, driven by robust AI demand. For Q4 2026, the company reported revenue of $2.22 billion, representing 22.1% year-over-year growth. The company's adjusted EPS of $0.80 matched analyst estimates, while forward guidance for Q1 2026 was $2.4 billion, surprising investors with a 5.2% upside surprise. Data center revenue surpassed $6 billion in fiscal 2026, growing 46% year-over-year. Custom silicon, which creates specialized chips for major cloud providers, doubled year-over-year. Management highlighted that this segment maintains strong diversification across top U.S. hyperscalers. For Q1 FY2027, net revenue is expected to be $2.400 billion plus or minus 5%. The company raised FY2027 revenue outlook to approach $11 billion, representing more than 30% YoY growth versus prior approximately $10 billion guidance, and projects FY2028 revenue near $15 billion, representing approximately 40% YoY growth.
